import { Tabs } from 'nextra/components'

# Greeter

GreeterService provides greeting functionality.

**Package:** `greeter.v1`

---

<div style={{borderLeft: '3px solid #0070f3', paddingLeft: '1.5rem', marginTop: '2rem', marginBottom: '2rem'}}>

### <span style={{backgroundColor: '#0070f3', color: 'white', padding: '2px 10px', borderRadius: '4px', fontSize: '0.7rem', fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: 'monospace', verticalAlign: 'middle', marginRight: '0.5rem'}}>UNARY</span> SayHello

SayHello sends a greeting to the server.

<Tabs items={['Request: HelloRequest', 'Response: HelloReply']}>
  <Tabs.Tab>

| Field | Type | | Description |
|-------|------|:---:|-------------|
| `name` | `string` |  | name is the name of the person to greet. |
| `language` | `string` | <span style={{fontSize:'0.7rem',background:'#9ca3af',color:'white',padding:'1px 6px',borderRadius:'3px'}}>optional</span> | language optionally selects the greeting language. |

</Tabs.Tab>
  <Tabs.Tab>

| Field | Type | | Description |
|-------|------|:---:|-------------|
| `message` | `string` |  | message is the greeting message. |

</Tabs.Tab>
</Tabs>

</div>

---

<div style={{borderLeft: '3px solid #7928ca', paddingLeft: '1.5rem', marginTop: '2rem', marginBottom: '2rem'}}>

### <span style={{backgroundColor: '#7928ca', color: 'white', padding: '2px 10px', borderRadius: '4px', fontSize: '0.7rem', fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: 'monospace', verticalAlign: 'middle', marginRight: '0.5rem'}}>SERVER STREAM</span> SayHelloStream

SayHelloStream streams greetings back to the client.

<Tabs items={['Request: HelloRequest', 'Response: HelloReply']}>
  <Tabs.Tab>

| Field | Type | | Description |
|-------|------|:---:|-------------|
| `name` | `string` |  | name is the name of the person to greet. |
| `language` | `string` | <span style={{fontSize:'0.7rem',background:'#9ca3af',color:'white',padding:'1px 6px',borderRadius:'3px'}}>optional</span> | language optionally selects the greeting language. |

</Tabs.Tab>
  <Tabs.Tab>

| Field | Type | | Description |
|-------|------|:---:|-------------|
| `message` | `string` |  | message is the greeting message. |

</Tabs.Tab>
</Tabs>

</div>
